appliedUpdates.description: Documented that the shared `.factory/init.sh` / `.factory/services.yaml` setup re-runs `shadcn init` and `shadcn add --overwrite`, which can overwrite tracked UI primitive files during later fixes and may require restoring local edits.

rejectedObservations.observation: The frontend-experience-worker procedure still allows workers to claim full compliance without browser-validation evidence, even for UI-changing features.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the procedure-compliance/browser-validation guidance already captured in round 1; no materially new orchestrator action is needed beyond that prior recommendation.
